message:
fix(embed,lexical,rerank): replace non-existent PolledAfterCompletion with wildcard match

Commit 9cba0331 added match arms for LockError::PolledAfterCompletion,
but this variant does not exist in the published asupersync 0.2.9
(LockError only has Poisoned and Cancelled). This caused compilation
failure.

Replace the non-existent variant with a `_` wildcard catch-all, which
compiles correctly and future-proofs against new variants.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
